entertainment.title: Who is Pavala Shyamala? Veteran actor found on street after being turned away by hospital receives aid from Dil Raju
entertainment.summary: Telugu actor Pavala Shyamala, who has worked in hundreds of projects was turned away at a hospital due to lack of funds. Dil Raju has stepped in to help.

entertainment.summary: Vishal said Rajmohan is someone who has lesser or no experience of what is happening in the Tamil film industry.
